steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function.
$$g(x)=\frac{1}{8}(3)^x$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Compute the output.
$$g(0)=\frac{1}{8}(3)^0$$
$$g(0)=\frac{1}{8}(1)=\frac{1}{8}$$
So the $y$-intercept is $(0,\frac{1}{8})$. The answer is B.
